subcodes.title: Words spoken over lunch on 1913-04-03
subcodes.first_line: I dreamed I was in Tiberias. Along the shore I was living alone in a small cottage which was built with mud bricks
subcodes.subjects: @accounts of dreams and visions, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
